text.title: Creative Brief Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for one creative brief. Validator enforces typed inputs + named owner + traceable decisions.

example.code: { "brief_id": "cb-acme-meta-lead-gen-2026q2", "campaign": {"name": "Acme Meta Lead-Gen Q2", "type": "lead-gen", "channel": "meta", "starts_at": "2026-06-01"}, "audience": {"definition": "SaaS founders 25-50 employees, US/EU", "source": "icp-doc.md#segment-3"}, "angle": {"text": "Ship in weeks not months", "source": "icp-doc.md#objection-time-to-market"}, "hook": {"text": "What if you shipped in 2 weeks?", "source": "interview-transcripts/t-2026-05-12.md"}, "proof": [{"claim": "Acme shipped in 14 days vs 90", "source": "case-study/acme.md"}], "cta": {"primary": "Book a 15-min demo", "secondary": "Read the case study"}, "format": {"aspect": "1:1", "duration_or_length": "15s video + 3 static"}, "owner": "@alex-marketing", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: Owner is "team" (banned); angle is untyped (no source); missing campaign, audience, hook, proof, cta, format, version, last_reviewed.

list.item: Owner matching "team / we / us / engineering / marketing / growth" (case-insensitive).
Any of angle / hook / proof items without a `source` field.
Version regressed below the previous brief's version.
